scenario.name: uas_simple_scenario
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] [last_Record-Route:] [last_Route:] Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000

INVITE [$uac_ct_uri] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [$full_route] From: "[field0]" <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] To: [$uac_from_uri] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Allow: PRACK, INVITE, ACK, BYE, CANCEL, UPDATE, INFO, SUBSCRIBE, NOTIFY, REFER, MESSAGE, OPTIONS Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Ficticious Test Content-Type: application/sdp User-Agent: sipp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 0 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:40 a=inactive

ACK [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] From: "[field0]" <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] Allow: PRACK, INVITE, ACK, BYE, CANCEL, UPDATE, INFO, SUBSCRIBE, NOTIFY, REFER, MESSAGE, OPTIONS Max-Forwards: 70 CSeq: [cseq] ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port] User-Agent: sipp Content-Length: 0

INVITE [$uac_ct_uri] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [$full_route] From: "[field0]" <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] To: [$uac_from_uri] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Allow: PRACK, INVITE, ACK, BYE, CANCEL, UPDATE, INFO, SUBSCRIBE, NOTIFY, REFER, MESSAGE, OPTIONS Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Ficticious Test Content-Type: application/sdp User-Agent: sipp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 0 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:40

ACK [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] From: "[field0]" <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] Allow: PRACK, INVITE, ACK, BYE, CANCEL, UPDATE, INFO, SUBSCRIBE, NOTIFY, REFER, MESSAGE, OPTIONS Max-Forwards: 70 CSeq: [cseq] ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port] User-Agent: sipp Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] [last_Record-Route:] [last_Route:] Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
